name: NeutronIndex
description: Live multi-cloud AI compute pricing and true TCO index. Hourly-updated GPU pricing, energy cost, carbon intensity, and spot availability across 25+ cloud providers. Includes regional electricity pricing, carbon emissions data, and true cost per FLOP calculations.
rai:dataCollection: All pricing data sourced from official cloud provider APIs (Shadeform, RunPod, Vast.ai, AWS, Azure, GCP). Energy data from Electricity Maps, WattTime, EIA, and ENTSO-E. No user-generated content.
rai:dataBiases: Provider coverage weighted toward US regions. Spot pricing volatility may not capture all intraday fluctuations. Carbon intensity data resolution varies by grid zone.
rai:dataLimitations: Spot pricing snapshots taken hourly may miss intraday volatility
Carbon intensity data may lag by up to 1 hour
Not all providers expose all regions via API
TDP-based energy estimates may differ from actual consumption

distribution.name: NeutronIndex Latest CSV
distribution.description: Full pricing, TCO, energy, and carbon dataset in CSV format, updated hourly

distribution.name: NeutronIndex Latest Parquet
distribution.description: Full dataset in Apache Parquet format for efficient analytics

distribution.name: Documentation
distribution.description: Primary dataset documentation with schema, methodology, and usage instructions

recordSet.name: compute_pricing_tco
recordSet.description: Multi-cloud GPU pricing with true TCO including energy and carbon costs

field.name: price_per_hour_usd
field.description: Raw GPU price per hour in USD

field.name: tco_per_hour_usd
field.description: True total cost of ownership per hour including energy costs

field.name: carbon_per_hour_gco2
field.description: Carbon emissions per hour in grams CO2 equivalent

field.name: electricity_price_kwh
field.description: Regional electricity price in USD per kWh
